channel.title: Home Barista Lab
channel.description: Fresh takes for home coffee enthusiasts.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: pour over technique
item.description: The persistent myths around pour over technique, stress-tested against what home coffee enthusiasts actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your espresso in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying espresso project for home coffee enthusiasts — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/pourover is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the gear community this week.

item.title: The roasting checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified roasting purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Balancing the Perfect Shot: Mastering Espresso Distribution
item.description: Expert tips for even extraction.

item.title: "budget grinder upgrade" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about budget grinder upgrade through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your gear questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the gear questions home coffee enthusiasts keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in roasting with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest roasting adjustments that home coffee enthusiasts report mattering most.

item.title: The Espresso Machine Maintenance Schedule You Need
item.description: Stay on top of espresso machine upkeep

item.title: The Tamping Technique You Need to Master
item.description: Get the perfect tamp for better espresso

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of pour-over
item.description: The most common early stumbles in pour-over, and the cheap corrections that fix them for home coffee enthusiasts.

item.title: "home espresso dial in" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about home espresso dial in through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Unlocking the Perfect Espresso Grind
item.description: Dial in your grind for better espresso
